result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  SpringScrap [options]

Options:
  -s, --service <service> (REQUIRED)          Service name to get configuration
  -e, --environment <environment> (REQUIRED)  Environment name to get configuration
  -o, --output <output>                       Name of the Output JSON file. [default: appsettings.spring.json]
  -u, --spring-uri <spring-uri>               URI of the spring cloud service. If not provided, it will use the SPRING_SCRAP_URI environment variable. []
  --version                                   Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information

Description:

Usage:

  -e, --environment <environment> (REQUIRED)  Environment name to get configuration

  -u, --spring-uri <spring-uri>               URI of the spring cloud service. If not provided, it will use the SPRING_SCRAP_URI environment variable. []
  --version                                   Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information
